steps.description: Retarget the API load test package scripts from Task 2 to Task 0 and ensure the default API load test entrypoint points at the canonical Task 0 scenario/profile/environment naming expected by the task.
Retarget the workspace/root package scripts so all top-level load test commands delegate to the updated Task 0 API scripts instead of stale Task 2 names.
Align the canonical load test configuration constants with Task 0 naming and wiring, including task/scenario/workflow labels and exported defaults used by the script and validators.

Update the load test scenario runner so emitted labels, tags, metrics metadata, and flow grouping consistently reference Task 0 canonical naming sourced from configuration rather than hardcoded or stale identifiers.
Refresh load test validation messaging and expectations so canonical-run validation text explicitly matches Task 0 naming and remains consistent with the updated scenario semantics.
Update the load test validation tests to assert the revised Task 0 naming, canonical run expectations, and script/config wiring end-to-end for the validation helper surface.
